message:
fix(connector): harden activation pipeline input validation and replace stubs with real implementations

Five connector subsystem improvements:

- activation_pipeline: DefaultExecutor validates inputs — create_sandbox
  rejects empty/non-JSON config; mount_secrets rejects empty refs, null
  bytes, path traversal (.., leading /, backslash); issue_capabilities
  rejects empty names. Nine new tests cover all validation paths.
- cancellation_protocol: ResourceGuard::drop() emits structured
  tracing::warn! with event code CAN-006 instead of silent comment,
  providing audit trail for leaked resources. Refactor let-chains for
  stable Rust compatibility.
- mod.rs: operator_intelligence cfg gate changed to
  cfg(any(test, feature = "extended-surfaces")) so tests can access it
- operator_intelligence: RollbackProof::content_hash() added for
  integrity verification; verify() checks rollback_spec format
  (INV-OIR-ROLLBACK-SOUND); execute_recommendation() uses real
  context fingerprint instead of [0u8; 32]
- supervision: shutdown() measures actual elapsed time via
  Instant::now() instead of hardcoded duration_ms: 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
